reason: Enabling FIPS mode on a preinstalled system is not supported; the system must be installed with the fips=1 kernel boot parameter. Changing crypto.fips_enabled at runtime will not persist and may break cryptographic services.
estimated_impact: reboot required; System may lose cryptographic functionality; Requires reboot or reinstall to take effect; Changing FIPS mode on a running system is unsupported; Potential disruption to services relying on cryptographic modules
